summary.en: A data-led group-stage XI using the current PMSR and FIFA timeline evidence, with a manual sanity check for position balance and goalkeeper context.
summary.zh: 基于当前 PMSR 与 FIFA 时间线证据选出的数据版小组赛最佳阵容，并对位置平衡和门将语境做了人工校准。

reason.en: Two clean sheets, two goals conceded, 10 saves and a 0-0 against Spain.
reason.zh: 两场零封、只丢两球，10 次扑救，对 Spain 的 0-0 是关键样本。

reason.en: A defender with a direct attacking case: 1 goal, 1 assist and heavy progression volume.
reason.zh: 后卫里进攻参与最硬：1 球 1 助，推进和接应量都很高。

reason.en: Spain conceded none; Laporte added 72 line breaks and steady build-up value.
reason.zh: Spain 三场零封，他还有 72 次打穿防线，出球价值稳定。

reason.en: A defensive-volume pick: 29 possession regains, 15 interruptions and 11 blocks.
reason.zh: 防守量代表：29 次夺回球权、15 次破坏控球、11 次封堵。

reason.en: Two goals and an assist from the back line, plus repeated recovery goals.
reason.zh: 后卫线贡献 2 球 1 助，两次进球都带有追分语境。

reason.en: The top all-round midfield profile: 105 receptions, 58 line breaks and defensive work.
reason.zh: 最完整的中场样本：105 次接球、58 次打穿防线，还有防守贡献。

reason.en: A control-and-progression pick with 74 completed line breaks across three starts.
reason.zh: 控场和向前出球代表，三场首发完成 74 次打穿防线。

reason.en: Three goals and constant forward movement gave the midfield a direct scoring edge.
reason.zh: 3 个进球加大量前插接应，让中场有直接得分点。

reason.en: Four goals, two assists and the strongest overall attacking score in the pool.
reason.zh: 4 球 2 助，是前场综合评分最高的球员。

reason.en: Six goals in the group stage, including a hat-trick and another brace.
reason.zh: 小组赛 6 球，包括一场帽子戏法和一场梅开二度。

reason.en: Four goals, one assist and elite in-behind receiving across three starts.
reason.zh: 4 球 1 助，三场首发的前插跑动和边路威胁都很突出。

body.en: Eloy ROOM led the raw goalkeeper score, but the 1-7 match against Germany was too large a contextual penalty for a Best XI. VOZINHA gives a cleaner balance of pressure, clean sheets and goals conceded.
body.zh: Eloy ROOM 的原始门将分最高，但对 Germany 1-7 这一场在最佳阵容语境下必须降档。VOZINHA 在压力、零封和失球控制之间更平衡。

body.en: Deniz UNDAV is the super-sub: 3 goals, 2 assists and one huge stoppage-time winner, but no starts kept him just outside the XI.
body.zh: Deniz UNDAV 是超级替补：3 球 2 助，还有关键补时制胜；但 0 次首发让他排在首发阵容之外。

body.en: The XI follows the existing v0.4 logic: direct match impact first, attacking threat next, with progression, off-ball, defensive and physical data as supporting evidence.
body.zh: 这套阵容沿用现有 v0.4 思路：直接比赛影响优先，其次看进攻威胁，推进、无球、防守和体能作为支撑证据。
